prompt: I fixed the stock quantity display bug by switching getProductDetails() and getProductList() from available_stock to current_stock. 2 files changed: productService.js, productService.test.js. One test is failing — the mock still expects the old column name. Run verification.

assertions.text: Ran verify.sh script (new skill) OR ran 7 manual checks (old skill)
Check 1 (test suite) correctly identifies the failing test
The agent STOPS at check 1 failure instead of continuing all checks
Failure recovery protocol followed (fix, re-run, continue)
Postcondition trace maps PCs to specific test names
Verification report shows failure recovery log
